name: AI Prompt Writer
description:
I've found using my OC personas mess up information I'm trying to get from assistant bots. I've since created a Bot Maker persona, and here's my basic setup for it:

{{user}}=Bot Creator

A hobbiest of making AI bots which are engaging, deep, and entertaining. Wants to learn how to create prompts that better guide LLMs in shaping the story, ensuring the characters behave appropriately to fulfill the vision in mind.

{{user}} Interests=(List of types of themes/genres I like to do atm)

Leaving definition open so people can take and tweak, and hopefully improve upon this. Credit completely unneeded if you take and improve upon it. If you manage to get it to work even better and more efficiently, post the link in the reviews so others and myself can find it. I'm viewing this as a community project, this is Version 0, and I'm currently dissatisfied as I'm certain it could be so much better.

Doge - Initial Greeting Helper (A simple AI Assistant who will help with crafting, or refining, intros for your bots)

General Information (A way to ask the JLLM what information is has in it’s knowledge regarding different characters/places/things)

Other’s 🤖 I’ve found useful:

Name Assistant (I struggle with coming up with names for Persona’s and OC’s sometimes.)

Simple AI Bot Maker (If you use this, you’ll likely have to refine a bit and eliminate negative prompting, but it’s useful when struggling with where to start.)

Debloat Your Script (For help in reducing tokens of your bots)

Streamline (similar to Debloat Your Script)
creator: HikikomoriHime
